MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-09-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Steven B. Taxman, Esq. 567-9600 for pltf & opposing party; Denise A. Ruelas, Esq. 899-1770 for defts & moving parties Fire Insurance Exchange and Jeffrey S. Lee.
RULING: Argued and the Court granted summary adjudication as to breach of contract, denied the CCP 437c(h) continuance, and took under submission the negligence cause of action as to both defendants. (JJM/PB)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-24-2002 Continued To Jul-09-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: CONTINUED TO 7/9/02. MOVING PARTY TO LODGE COURTESY COPIES PER SF LOCAL RULE 8.5. PLEASE ATTACH COVER LETTER CONFIRMING NEW HEARING DATE.

Off Calendar May-02-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Steven Taxman, Esq. 567-9600 for pltf & moving party; Denise A. Ruelas, Esq. 899-1770 for defts & opposing parties Fire Insurance Exchange and Jeffrey S. Lee.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling without prejudice. Pltf to submit order.

MOTION For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
